repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #83041 on the existing contributor branch so the config patch restart-required notice fix can return to merge-ready state without replacing contributor work.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(config): repair config patch restart-required notices
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair PR #83041 on its existing branch after the plan preflight found unstable checks. This keeps @xuruiray's source PR as the canonical path for #46797, preserves attribution, and limits changes to the restart-sentinel/config-write flow plus focused regression tests.

Validation:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/restart-sentinel.test.ts src/gateway/server-restart-sentinel.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/config.shared-auth.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Refs: #83041, #46797
credit_notes: Source PR #83041 by @xuruiray remains the canonical branch and should keep contributor attribution.
Existing Clownfish repair commits are already on the branch; keep @xuruiray credited in the PR body/changelog if user-facing release notes mention the fix.
